title: GRC Compliance Violation: SSH Configuration Security
description:
**Compliance Check Failed**

**Check ID:** SEC002
**Check Name:** SSH Configuration Security
**Category:** Network Security
**Severity:** Critical

**Issues Identified:**
- Password authentication enabled (consider key-based)

**Details:** SSH configuration security checked

**Timestamp:** 2026-06-14T04:20:00.163617

**Recommended Actions:**

- Consider using key-based authentication instead of passwords
- Ensure SSH Protocol 2 is used
- Review SSH configuration file permissions
